We bring together content from thousands of publishers in a single, beautifully designed platform.How much does it cost?addPaygees offers a free tier with access to thousands of free titles, plus premium subscription plans with full library access. Browse thousands of free titles with no subscription.Can I read offline?addYes. Download any title to your device and read it offline, whether you’re on a plane, in a rural area, or simply saving data. Your reading progress syncs when you reconnect.Is there a kids section?addAbsolutely. Paygees Junior is a safe, ad-free reading environment for children ages 0–12 with curated, age-appropriate content and guardian controls built in.How do publishers get paid?addPublishers earn competitive revenue shares on every sale and token redemption.
